info.title: PayVessel Value-Added Services API
info.description: API reference for PayVessel biller reseller, eSIM, and gift card services.

get.description: Get available billers for a given category
Get available items/packages for a specific biller and category

post.description: Create a biller reseller order and charge the merchant wallet

get.description: Get a biller reseller order by ID

post.description: Validate a customer recharge account (e.g. betting account ID) before placing an order
Create an eSIM order and charge the merchant wallet

get.description: Get an eSIM order by ID and refresh provider status when needed
List available eSIM packages with optional provider-compatible filters
List all supported eSIM regions from the configured provider
List all countries that have gift card products available
Retrieve a single country by its numeric ID

get.summary: List Gift Card Operators by Country
get.description: Fetch all gift card operators available in a specific country using its ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code
Fetch all available products for a given gift card operator ID

post.description: Purchase a gift card and charge the business managed wallet

400.description: Bad request — duplicate reference, product not found, insufficient balance, or wallet charge failed

424.description: Unable to reach upstream service or purchase failed

get.description: Retrieve a gift card order by ID
Verify the status of a gift card order by its reference. Checks the provider for the latest status if the order is not yet final.
